zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sara Eustace于1152年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾瓦爾福德。她和Sir Richard le Yonge de Walford至少有1个儿子。她去世于1195年在她的家乡享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eustace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Eustace (male and female), via Old French Eustace (male) from Latin Eustachius, Eustacius, from Greek Eustachios, composed of the elements eu ‘good’ and stachys ‘ear (of grain)’, hence ‘fruitful’. The name was borne by various early Christian saints, but little is known of the most famous Saint Eustace, patron saint of hunters, said to have been converted by the vision of a crucifix between the antlers of a hunted stag. In North America, this surname form of the name may have absorbed Greek surnames based on the similar personal name Efstathios, such as Efstathiadis and Efstathiou . See also Stacey .

variants.name: Heustis
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Eustace  .

variants.name: Estacio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Manuel, Adolfo, Aida, Benigno, Carolina, Celedonio, Cosme, Edgardo, Emilio, Enrique.
Portuguese, Galician, and Spanish: variant of Eustacio (see Eustace ).

variants.name: Eustache
meanings: French and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from the French personal name Eustache, from Latin Eustachius (see Eustace ). This surname was brought to the US mainly from Haiti.

variants.name: Astacio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Miguel, Jorge, Julio, Justo, Luis, Aida, Alberto, Andres, Angel, Carlos, Domingo.

Spanish: probably from a variant of the personal name Estacio (Latin Eustachius; see Eustace ). This surname is found mainly in the Dominican Republic. In Spain, it is concentrated in Alcalá de Guadaira, in Seville province.

variants.name: Eustaquio
meanings: Spanish and Portuguese: from the personal name Eustaquio (see Eustace ).

variants.name: Eustis
meanings: English (Glamorgan): variant of   Eustace  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Efstathiou
meanings: Greek: patronymic from the genitive case of the personal name Efstathios, classical Greek Eustathios ‘well-grounded, firm, steadfast’ (from eu ‘well’ + stathēs ‘standing’, a derivative of histēmi ‘to stand’). Eustathios was the name of several saints and patriarchs of the Eastern Church. In the early Middle Ages this name became confused in the Western Church with Eustachios ‘fruitful’ (see Eustace ).

variants.name: Huestis
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of English   Eustace  . Compare   Heustis  .

nameMeanings.name: Sara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

variants.name: Sarah
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

en.lifeSummary: Sara Eustace was born in 1152, in Walford, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 son with Sir Richard le Yonge de Walford. She died in 1195, in her hometown, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Sara Eustace est née en 1152, à Walford, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Sir Richard le Yonge de Walford. Elle est décédée en 1195, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sara Eustace wurde 1152 in Walford, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hatte mit Sir Richard le Yonge de Walford mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1195 im Alter von 43 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Sara Eustace è nata il nel 1152 nel Walford, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Sir Richard le Yonge de Walford. Morì nel 1195, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sara Eustace(은)는 1152년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 월퍼드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir Richard le Yonge de Walford(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1195년 그녀의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sara Eustace nasceu em 1152, em Walford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Sir Richard le Yonge de Walford. Ela faleceu em 1195, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sara Eustace родилась в 1152 г. в местности валфорд, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Sir Richard le Yonge de Walford. Она умерла в 1195 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sara Eustace nació en 1152, en Walford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Sir Richard le Yonge de Walford. Murió en 1195, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años.
